reviews.review_description: Its a very nice exciting game! I only played The climb like this before! Hope I can keep balance by my hand and feet not only my head in the update and do not give up the quest1 user it should be works good in this contents I think.

reviews.review_title: Wow! Legs and feet who needs them? Lol!
reviews.review_description: Nice graphics, challenging, frustrating but that's the whole challenge. Great job and thank you dev for a great free game.
I love this idea! But the walking mechanics using the analog sticks is way incredibly hard and not fun!
